message:
feat: BF16→Float32 conversion for MPSGraph - BREAKTHROUGH!

Major achievements:
✅ BF16→Float32 conversion layer implemented
✅ Large 5120×5120 matmul works perfectly!
✅ Dynamic graph rebuild for different shapes
✅ Proper memory management (no buffer release crashes)
✅ Program completes successfully end-to-end

Technical details:
- Added bf16ToFloat32() and float32ToBF16() converters
- Allocate/reuse Float32 buffers for conversion
- Create new MPSGraph when shape changes
- Use NoCopy buffers (views, not released)
- Results written via unified memory

Performance:
- Small test: 2x2 matmul succeeds
- Large test: [1,5120] × [5120,5120] succeeds
- Ready for 60-second NPU power measurement!

Known limitations:
- Graph/buffer leaks on shutdown (acceptable for now)
- Creating new graph per shape change (could cache multiple)

Next: Measure NPU power consumption
